hero.subtitle: Transform your photos through AI-powered fusion and start earning from your creations. Create, fuse, and monetize your images—all in one platform.
hero.createBody: Upload your photo and let AI generate a unique virtual image.
hero.tradeBody: Buy and sell images in real-time and earn exposure instantly.
hero.enhanceBody: Fuse two photos to enhance features and create trade-ready images.
hero.cta: Join now and get 100 bonus points.

sectionCreate.heading: CREATE IMAGES
bullets: Prepare your face photo and upload it to an empty gallery slot.
AI verifies the photo contains a real human face.
Based on your facial structure, it generates a completely new virtual image.
The created image is automatically added to your gallery, ready for trading or enhancement.

sectionTrade.heading: TRADE WITH CONFIDENCE
bullets: Click Purchase to buy images you like from the marketplace.
Purchasing an image immediately gives you exposure opportunities for your own photos.
Click Sell, select a gallery image, set exposure value, and start selling in real-time.
After a successful sale, a congratulatory screen and final sales summary appear.
All trading follows fair system rules for transparency and reliability.

sectionFusion.heading: ENHANCE WITH FUSION
bullets: Fuse two photos to create upgraded images using facial attribute values.
Fusion requires a minimum score earned from previous trades.
Each photo can be fused up to six times to gradually enhance appeal.
A fused image's value is ultimately determined by other users and confirmed via license sales.
Newly fused images can then be traded, creating additional earning opportunities.

landingFeatures.title: All Features in One
left: Upload your face photo and let AI generate a completely new, one-of-a-kind virtual image.
Buy and sell images in real-time, earning exposure and tracking your sales instantly.
Earn points and rewards by selling images and leveraging AI-enhanced virtual assets.
right: Fuse two photos to refine facial features and create sharper, trade-ready images.
Increase your image's score through trading and fusion to boost their marketplace value.
Apply sponsor products or backgrounds to images for fresh earning opportunities.

steps.title: Start with Your Photo
steps.description: Choose a photo of your face and upload it to an empty gallery slot. The AI will verify it's a real human face.

steps.title: Generate a Virtual Image
steps.description: Based on your facial structure, the AI creates a completely new virtual face that doesn't exist anywhere else.

steps.title: Enhance Through Fusion
steps.description: Select two photos and fuse them to improve facial features. Fusion can be repeated multiple times to gradually enhance your images.

steps.title: List and Trade
steps.description: Put your images up for sale or purchase others. Each trade gives points and exposure opportunities to help grow your image's value.

steps.title: Increase Image Value
steps.description: Score your images through trading, fusion, and other activities. Higher scores mean higher value and better earning potential.

steps.title: Redeem Rewards
steps.description: Collect points from your activities and exchange them for gift cards or other real-world rewards.
